data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Task complete ✓ — plugins/dso/docs/contracts/red-test-evaluator-verdict.md created with full INPUT schema (writer rejection payload + orchestrator context envelope), VERDICT:REVISE (impact_assessment array with task_id/impact_type, affected_tasks, revision_guidance), VERDICT:REJECT (rejection_reason, recommended_model), VERDICT:CONFIRM (infeasibility_category enum with all 4 values, justification), failure contract, and versioning policy.
